name: MPT-30B-Instruct
note: Instruction-tuned MPT-30B for long-context single-turn tasks, fine-tuned on Dolly/HH-RLHF-derived data, released under CC-BY-SA-3.0.

results.notes: F1 score (harness|drop|3, 3-shot), from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1's own evaluation-run results JSON for mosaicml/mpt-30b-instruct (third-party aggregator run, not vendor-reported)
5-shot accuracy (harness|gsm8k|5), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 run
5-shot accuracy (harness|winogrande|5), HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 run

acc_norm, 25-shot (harness|arc:challenge|25) from the HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1's own evaluation-run results JSON (run 2023-07-20T13:11:24.937399), independently fetched and recomputed from the raw results_2023-07-20T13-11-24.937399.json file for mosaicml/mpt-30b-instruct. Same convention (acc_norm) as the sibling base-model entry mpt-30b.json uses for its own arc-challenge=56 result, verified against that model's raw JSON too.
acc_norm, 10-shot (harness|hellaswag|10) from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 run (2023-07-20T13:11:24.937399) for mosaicml/mpt-30b-instruct, recomputed from the raw results JSON.

5-shot accuracy averaged across all 57 hendrycksTest subtasks (HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 MMLU convention), computed directly from the raw results_2023-07-20T13-11-24.937399.json file for mosaicml/mpt-30b-instruct (run has all 57 harness|hendrycksTest-*|5 subtask scores).

MC2, 0-shot (harness|truthfulqa:mc|0) from the same HF Open LLM Leaderboard v1 run (2023-07-20T13:11:24.937399) for mosaicml/mpt-30b-instruct, recomputed from the raw results JSON. Matches the sibling base-model entry mpt-30b.json's own truthfulqa=38.4 (mc2) sourcing convention.

verificationNotes: Confirmed released alongside MPT-30B base on 2023-06-22 (same Databricks announcement); HF model card and secondary sources confirm CC-BY-SA-3.0 license and Dolly/HH-RLHF-derived instruction tuning data. No result rows to verify. All fields left unchanged.
